[cron:0f65bca4-8d31-40d6-8d98-d1f8e1a97258 HB Trading 30m] HB Trading 30m
Current time: Sunday, March 1st, 2026 — 02:00 (Europe/Madrid)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

Here is the summary for the HB Trading 30m cron job:

This is the daily 30-minute heartbeat check-in for the HB Trading system. This runs at 2:00 AM Europe/Madrid time every day.

The key things to review are:

- Check that all core trading processes are running normally
- Review any trade activity or market events from the past 24 hours
- Verify data feeds are functioning correctly
- Ensure risk management thresholds have not been breached
- Follow up on any alerts or notifications from the previous day

If everything looks good, no further action is required. Log the heartbeat completion and prepare for the next scheduled run tomorrow morning.

Let me know if you need me to look into anything specific related to this regular system check.
